description_long: This object is a large, flat patch of sand with a uniform, light tan coloration and a subtle, fine-grained texture across its surface. The sand appears evenly distributed, with no visible mounds, depressions, or irregularities, suggesting it has been undisturbed for some time. The edges of the patch are straight and sharply defined, giving it a distinctly rectangular shape. The surface finish is matte, with minimal reflectivity, and the texture is consistent throughout, lacking any visible debris or foreign objects. The sand patch is expansive and thin, resembling a section of sandy ground that might be found in a playground, park, or construction site. Its appearance suggests it is intended to serve as a walkable, supportive surface in an urban or semi-urban environment.
description: A large, flat, rectangular patch of fine, light tan sand with a uniform, matte surface and sharply defined edges. The sand is evenly distributed and free of debris or visible disturbances.
description_view_0: From this view, the sand patch appears as a wide, flat rectangle with a consistent tan color and fine texture, showing no elevation or surface variation.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the same flat, rectangular shape, with the fine sand texture and uniform color remaining consistent across the surface.
description_view_2: The sand patch is again seen as a broad, even surface with no visible changes in texture or color, emphasizing its regularity and clean edges.
description_view_3: This view continues to show the flat, rectangular sand patch with a smooth, uninterrupted surface and well-defined boundaries.
attribute_boundary_definition: The boundaries are sharply defined and straight, giving the sand patch a clear, rectangular outline with no blending into adjacent surfaces.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: The sand patch appears isolated, with crisp, well-defined edges and no visible blending or transition to other materials.
